item.name: Wind-up Thancred
item.description:
Two hundred percent more dreamy than previous models.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Thancred minion.
item.tooltip:
I suppose any name is as
good as another, though
most call me Thancred.
  - Thancred
item.specialactiondescription:
Sets a trap that, when triggered, delivers an attack with a potency of 260 to all enemies within range.
Activation Delay: 10s
